title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness that enables self-building codebases to ship their own code through custom agent workflows. It serves as the orchestration layer for Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory project, supporting multi-model routing strategies.
